rationale: Educ. Code §45.154 governs stadium construction and operation by authorities. It has no relation to residence homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: An authority may construct, enlarge, furnish, and equip stadia, purchase existing stadia, furnishings, and equipment for its stadia, and operate and maintain stadia.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts; no conflict detected.
